pi_items.source: Verified by checking examples/ugene_env/scripts/install_ugene.sh which downloads NM_000207.3 or J00265.1 directly from NCBI eutils API.
Prompt description explicitly instructs the agent to act as a molecular and cellular biologist designing probes.
Standard classification matching the task's context in bioinformatics.
The verifier.py script enforces a plausible CDS length between 100 and 500, explicitly looking up this metadata value. Checked the actual GenBank file and confirmed the CDS is 333 bp.

Checked export_result.sh and setup_task.sh which explicitly define and use RESULTS_DIR="/home/ga/UGENE_Data/results/antisense_probe".

privileged_info_summary: I have completed a PI audit for the UGENE insulin antisense probe design task. The data comes directly from NCBI GenBank (NM_000207.3 or J00265.1) making it non-synthetic. A python script was used to analyze the GenBank file, which confirmed the expected CDS length of 333 nucleotides (bounded correctly by the 100 and 500 metadata constraints) and an approximate GC content of 64.6%. The expected results path matches the export scripts.
